ham.subject: Mandatory Security Awareness Training – Deadline 15 May 2026
ham.body:
Dear Colleagues,

As part of our ongoing commitment to protect our corporate assets, the Security & Compliance team is rolling out the annual Security Awareness Training on Phishing & Malware. Please complete the online module by Saturday, 15 May 2026.  You can access the training portal here: <URL>.

After successful completion, a certificate will be automatically uploaded to your employee profile. If you encounter any technical difficulties or have questions, contact the IT Help Desk at ithelp@examplecorp.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

John Doe
Head of Security & Compliance
ExampleCorp Ltd

spam.subject: URGENT: Your XYZ Bank Account Has Been Suspended
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your XYZ Bank online banking account has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity. If you do not verify your identity within the next 24 hours, your account will be permanently locked and any pending transactions may be denied.

To reactivate your account immediately, please click the secure verification link below and follow the on‑screen instructions:

<URL>

This action must be completed within 24 hours. If you believe this notice is a mistake, do not reply to this email. For assistance, contact our support team only through the official XYZ Bank website.

Thank you for choosing XYZ Bank.

Sincerely,

Alex Smith
XYZ Bank Security Operations
